headline: More Bad News at KKR’s Private Credit Fund
summary: The private credit fund that’s been a black eye for  KKR  looked even worse with Monday’s report of its latest results.  The value of  FS KKR Capital  loan portfolio declined 10% from December to March, ending at $18.83 a share.  “We are disappointed by our recent performance,” said Dan Pietrzak, the fund’s investment chief and head of private credit at KKR.
